scripts.parse:srds: npm run parse:srd-3-5 && npm run parse:srd-5-1
scripts.convert:enraged-eggplant: node scripts/run-python-script.mjs .agents/skills/convert-gurps-monsters-to-gcs/scripts/batch_convert_missing.py --overlap data/enraged-eggplant/srd-overlap.json --coverage data/enraged-eggplant/gcs-coverage.json --markdown data/enraged-eggplant/srd-overlap-monsters.md --output-dir converted/enraged-eggplant --selection all --library-root "data/GCS Master Library"
